study.name: Original study
study.note: This mode uses only the 149 songs from the original human-scored study dataset.

songs.title: Cold as You
songs.description: "And now that I'm sitting here thinking it through, I've never been anywhere cold as you."

songs.title: I'm Only Me When I'm With You
songs.description: "I'm only up when you're not down. Don't want to fly if you're still on the ground."

songs.title: Invisible
songs.description: "If you only knew me, we could be a beautiful miracle, unbelievable, instead of just invisible."

songs.title: Mary's Song
songs.description: "I'll be eighty-seven, you'll be eighty-nine. I'll still look at you like the stars that shine."

songs.title: Our Song
songs.description: "I've heard every album, listened to the radio. Waited for something to come along that was as good as our song"

songs.title: The Outside
songs.description: "I've been a lot of lonely places. I've never been on the outside."

songs.title: A Perfectly Good Heart
songs.description: "Why would you want to break a perfectly good heart? Why would you want to take our love and tear it all apart, now?"

songs.title: Picture to Burn
songs.description: "So watch me strike a match on all my wasted time. As far as I'm concerned, you're just another picture to burn."

songs.title: A Place in This World
songs.description: "I'm alone, on my own, and that's all I know. I'll be strong, I'll be wrong, oh but life goes on. Oh, I'm just a girl, trying to find a place in this world."

songs.title: Should've Said No
songs.description: "You shouldn't be begging for forgiveness at my feet. You should've said no, baby, and you might still have me."

songs.title: Stay Beautiful
songs.description: "I hope your life leads you back to my door. Oh, but if it don't, stay beautiful."

songs.title: Teardrops On My Guitar
songs.description: "He's the reason for the teardrops on my guitar. The only thing that keeps me wishing on a wishing star."

songs.title: Tied Together With a Smile
songs.description: "And you're tied together with a smile, but you're coming undone."

songs.title: Tim McGraw
songs.description: "When you think happiness, I hope you think that little black dress. Think of my head on your chest."

songs.title: Beautiful Eyes
songs.description: "Just as long as you're mine, I'll be your everything tonight."

songs.title: Breathe
songs.description: "And I can't breathe without you, but I have to."

songs.title: Change
songs.description: "Because these things will change. Can you feel it now? These walls that they put up to hold us back will fall down."

songs.title: Come in with the Rain
songs.description: "Just know I'm right here hoping that you'll come in with the rain."

songs.title: Fearless
songs.description: "And I don't know why but with you I'd dance in a storm in my best dress, fearless."

songs.title: Fifteen
songs.description: "Cause when you're fifteen and somebody tells you they love you, you're gonna believe them."

songs.title: Forever & Always
songs.description: "Everything is wrong. It rains when you're here, and it rains when you're gone. 'Cause I was there when you said forever and always."

songs.title: Hey Stephen
songs.description: "Can't help if I want to kiss you in the rain, so come feel this magic I've been feeling since I met you."

songs.title: I Heart ?
songs.description: "I've got an I heart ? written on the back of my hand."

songs.title: Jump Then Fall
songs.description: "Cause every time you smile, I smile. And every time you shine, I'll shine for you."

songs.title: Love Story
songs.description: "You'll be the prince and I'll be the princess. It's a love story, baby, just say yes."

songs.title: The Other Side of the Door
songs.description: "I said leave but all I really want is you to stand outside my window throwing pebbles, screaming 'I'm in love with you'."

songs.title: Superstar
songs.description: "Wide-eyed girl who's desperately in love with you. Give me a photograph to hang on my wall, superstar."

songs.title: Tell Me Why
songs.description: "Why do you have to make me feel small so you can feel whole inside? Why do you have to put down my dreams so you're the only thing on my mind?"

songs.title: Untouchable
songs.description: "It's like a million little stars spelling out your name. You gotta come on, come on. Say that we'll be together."

songs.title: The Way I Loved You
songs.description: "It's a roller coaster kind of rush. And I never knew that I could feel that much. And that's the way I loved you."

songs.title: White Horse
songs.description: "I was a dreamer before you went and let me down. Now it's too late for you and your white horse to come around."

songs.title: You Belong With Me
songs.description: "Can't you see that I'm the one who understands you? Been here all along, so why can't you see? You belong with me."

songs.title: You're Not Sorry
songs.description: "And you can tell me that you're sorry, but I don't believe you baby like I did before. You're not sorry."

songs.title: Back to December
songs.description: "So this is me swallowing my pride standing in front of you saying I'm sorry for that night."

songs.title: Better Than Revenge
songs.description: "I'm just another thing for you to roll your eyes at, honey. You might have him but I always get the last word."

songs.title: Dear John
songs.description: "Cause you've burned them out, but I took your matches before fire could catch me."

songs.title: Enchanted
songs.description: "I'm wonderstruck, dancing around all alone. I'll spend forever wondering if you knew I was enchanted to meet you."

songs.title: Haunted
songs.description: "I thought I had you figured out. Can't breathe whenever you're gone. Can't turn back now, I'm haunted."

songs.title: If This Was a Movie
songs.description: "I know that we could work it out somehow, but if this was a movie you'd be here by now."

songs.title: Last Kiss
songs.description: "I don't know how to be something you miss. I never thought we'd have a last kiss."

songs.title: Long Live
songs.description: "Long live all the mountains we moved. I had the time of my life fighting dragons with you."

songs.title: Mean
songs.description: "Someday I'll be living in a big old city, and all you're ever gonna be is mean."

songs.title: Mine
songs.description: "You made a rebel of a careless man's careful daughter. You are the best thing that's ever been mine."

songs.title: Ours
songs.description: "And it's not theirs to speculate if it's wrong. And your hands are tough, but they are where mine belong."

songs.title: Sparks Fly
songs.description: "Give me something that'll haunt me when you're not around, 'cause I see sparks fly whenever you smile."

songs.title: Speak Now
songs.description: "I am not the kind of girl who should be rudely barging in on a white veil occasion, but you are not the kind of boy who should be marrying the wrong girl."

songs.title: The Story of Us
songs.description: "I don't know what to say since the twist of fate when it all broke down. And the story of us looks a lot like a tragedy now."

songs.title: Superman
songs.description: "I watch superman fly away. Come back, I'll be with you someday. I'll be right here on the ground."
"We're happy, free, confused, and lonely at the same time. It's miserable and magical."

songs.title: All Too Well
songs.description: "Wind in my hair, I was there, I remember it all too well."

songs.title: Begin Again
songs.description: "I've been spending the last eight months thinking all love ever does is break and burn and end. But on a Wednesday, in a cafe, I watched it begin again."

songs.title: Come Back... Be Here
songs.description: "And this is when the feeling sinks in. I don't want to miss you like this. Come back, be here."

songs.title: Everything Has Changed
songs.description: "You'll be mine and I'll be yours. All I know since yesterday is everything has changed."

songs.title: Girl at Home
songs.description: "Don't look at me, you've got a girl at home, and everybody knows that."

songs.title: Holy Ground
songs.description: "Tonight I'm gonna dance for all that we've been through, but I don't want to dance if I'm not dancing with you."

songs.title: I Almost Do
songs.description: "And I wish I could run to you. And I hope you know that every time I don't, I almost do."

songs.title: I Knew You Were Trouble
songs.description: "I knew you were trouble when you walked in, so shame on me now."

songs.title: The Last Time
songs.description: "This is the last time I'm asking you this. Put my name at the top of your list."

songs.title: The Lucky One
songs.description: "And they tell you that you're lucky, but you're so confused. 'Cause you don't feel pretty, you just feel used."

songs.title: The Moment I Knew
songs.description: "Standing there in my party dress in red lipstick, with no one to impress."

songs.title: Red
songs.description: "Remembering him comes in flashbacks and echoes. Tell myself it's time now, got to let go, but moving on from him is impossible."

songs.title: Sad Beautiful Tragic
songs.description: "Distance, timing, breakdown, fighting. Silence, this train runs off its tracks."

songs.title: Starlight
songs.description: "The whole place was dressed to the nines and we were dancing, dancing like we're made of starlight."

songs.title: State of Grace
songs.description: "This is a state of grace. This is a worthwhile fight. Love is a ruthless game unless you play it good and right."

songs.title: Stay Stay Stay
songs.description: "But you carry my groceries and now I'm always laughing. And I love you because you have given me no choice but to stay stay stay."

songs.title: Treacherous
songs.description: "I can't decide if it's a choice, getting swept away. I hear the sound of my own voice asking you to stay."

songs.title: We Are Never Getting Back Together
songs.description: "You go talk to your friends, talk to my friends, talk to me. But we are never ever ever ever getting back together."

songs.title: All You Had To Do Was Stay
songs.description: "People like you always want back the love they pushed aside, but people like me are gone forever when you say goodbye. Hey, all you had to do was stay."

songs.title: Bad Blood
songs.description: "Now did you think it all through? All these things will catch up to you and time can heal but this won't. So, if you're coming my way, just don't."

songs.title: Blank Space
songs.description: "Got a long list of ex-lovers. They'll tell you I'm insane. But I've got a blank space, baby, and I'll write your name."

songs.title: Clean
songs.description: "And by morning gone was any trace of you. I think I am finally clean."

songs.title: How You Get the Girl
songs.description: "I would wait forever and ever. Broke your heart, I'll put it back together."

songs.title: I Know Places
songs.description: "Just grab my hand and don't ever drop it, my love. Baby, I know places we won't be found."

songs.title: I Wish You Would
songs.description: "I wish you would come back. Wish I'd never hung up the phone like I did."

songs.title: New Romantics
songs.description: "We are too busy dancing to get knocked off our feet. Baby we're the new romantics. The best people in life are free."

songs.title: Out of the Woods
songs.description: "I walked out and said 'I'm setting you free.' But the monsters turned out to be just trees. And when the sun came up, you were looking at me."

songs.title: Shake It Off
songs.description: "The haters gonna hate, hate, hate, hate, hate. Baby I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake. I shake it off."

songs.title: Style
songs.description: "And when we go crashing down, we come back every time 'cause we never go out of style."

songs.title: This Love
songs.description: "This love is alive back from the dead. These hands had to let it go free and this love came back to me."

songs.title: Welcome to New York
songs.description: "I could dance to this beat, beat forever more. The lights are so bright but they never blind me."

songs.title: Wildest Dreams
songs.description: "Say you'll see me again, even if it's just in your wildest dreams."

songs.title: Wonderland
songs.description: "You search the world for something else to make you feel like what we had. And in the end in wonderland we both went mad."

songs.title: You Are In Love
songs.description: "You can hear it in the silence. You can feel it on the way home. You can see it with the lights out. You are in love, true love."

songs.title: â€¦Ready For It?
songs.description: "In the middle of the night, in my dreams I know I'm gonna be with you so I take my time...Are you ready for it?"

songs.title: Call It What You Want
songs.description: "I'm laughing with my lover, making forts under covers. Trust him like a brother, yeah, you know I did one thing right."

songs.title: Dancing With Our Hands Tied
songs.description: "I loved you in spite of deep fears that the world would divide us. So, baby, can we dance, oh, through an avalanche?"

songs.title: Delicate
songs.description: "Long night, with your hands up in my hair. Echoes of your footsteps on the stairs. Stay here, honey, I don't want to share."

songs.title: Don't Blame Me
songs.description: "Don't blame me, love made me crazy. If it doesn't you ain't doin' it right."

songs.title: Dress
songs.description: "I don't want you like a best friend. Only bought this dress so you could take it off."

songs.title: End Game
songs.description: "So here's the truth from my red lips. I wanna be your endgame."

songs.title: Getaway Car
songs.description: "We were jet-set, Bonnie and Clyde, until I switched to the other side. It's no surprise I turned you in, 'cause us traitors never win."

songs.title: Gorgeous
songs.description: "If you've got a girlfriend, I'm jealous of her. But if you're single, that's honestly worse. 'Cause you're so gorgeous it actually hurts."

songs.title: I Did Something Bad
songs.description: "If a man talks shit, then I owe him nothing. I don't regret it one bit, 'cause he had it coming."

songs.title: King of My Heart
songs.description: "And all at once, you are the one I have been waiting for. King of my heart, body and soul."

songs.title: Look What You Made Me Do
songs.description: "And then the world moves on, but one thing's for sure. Maybe I got mine, but you'll all get yours."

songs.title: New Year's Day
songs.description: "I'll be there if you're the toast of the town babe, or if you strike out and you're crawling back home."

songs.title: So It Goesâ€¦
songs.description: "I'm yours to keep, and I'm yours to lose. You know I'm not a bad girl, but I do bad things with you."

songs.title: This Is Why We Can't Have Nice Things
songs.description: "There I was giving you a second chance, but you stabbed me in the back while shaking my hand."

songs.title: Afterglow
songs.description: "Fighting with a true love is boxing with no gloves. Chemistry 'til it blows up, 'til there's no us."

songs.title: Cornelia Street
songs.description: "And baby, I get mystified by how this city screams your name."

songs.title: Cruel Summer
songs.description: "Devils roll the dice, angels roll their eyes. What doesn't kill me makes me want you more."

songs.title: Daylight
songs.description: "I've been sleepin' so long in a twenty-year dark night, and now I see daylight."

songs.title: Death By A Thousand Cuts
songs.description: "Saying goodbye is death by a thousand cuts. Flashbacks waking me up."

songs.title: False God
songs.description: "Religion's in your lips. Even if it's a false god, we'd still worship."

songs.title: I Forgot That You Existed
songs.description: "Free rent, livin' in my mind. But then something happened one magical night. I forgot that you existed."

songs.title: I Think He Knows
songs.description: "I want you, bless my soul. And I ain't gotta tell him. I think he knows."

songs.title: It's Nice To Have A Friend
songs.description: "Video games, you pass me a note. Sleeping in tents. It's nice to have a friend."

songs.title: London Boy
songs.description: "They say home is where the heart is, but God, I love the English."

songs.title: Lover
songs.description: "Can I go where you go? Can we always be this close, forever and ever?"

songs.title: ME!
songs.description: "Baby doll, when it comes to a lover, I promise that you'll never find another like ME!"

songs.title: Miss Americana & The Heartbreak Prince
songs.description: "We're so sad, we paint the town blue. Voted most likely to run away with you."

songs.title: Paper Rings
songs.description: "I like shiny things, but I'd marry you with paper rings. Uh huh, that's right. Darling, you're the one I want."

songs.title: Soon You'll Get Better
songs.description: "Desperate people find faith, so now I pray to Jesus too. And I say to you, 'Soon you'll get better'."

songs.title: The Archer
songs.description: "'Cause all of my enemies started out friends. Help me hold onto you."

songs.title: The Man
songs.description: "I'm so sick of running as fast as I can. Wondering if I'd get there quicker if I was a man."

songs.title: You Need To Calm Down
songs.description: "You need to just stop. Like can you just not step on my gown? You need to calm down."

songs.title: Only the Young
songs.description: "Don't say you're too tired to fight. It's just a matter of time. Up there's the finish line."

songs.title: august
songs.description: "August sipped away like a bottle of wine, 'cause you were never mine."

songs.title: betty
songs.description: "I'm only seventeen. I don't know anything, but I know I miss you."

songs.title: cardigan
songs.description: "I knew you'd linger like a tattoo kiss. I knew you'd haunt all my what-ifs."

songs.title: epiphany
songs.description: "Only twenty minutes to sleep, but you dream of some epiphany. Just one single glimpse of relief."

songs.title: exile
songs.description: "You were my town. Now I'm in exile seeing you out."

songs.title: hoax
songs.description: "Don't want no other shade of blue but you. No other sadness in the world will do."

songs.title: illicit affairs
songs.description: "And you know damn well. For you I would ruin myself a million little times."

songs.title: invisible string
songs.description: "Isn't it just so pretty to think all along there was some invisible string tying you to me?"

songs.title: mad woman
songs.description: "And you'll poke that bear 'till her claws come out. And you find something to wrap your noose around."

songs.title: mirrorball
songs.description: "I'm a mirrorball. I can change everything about me to fit in."

songs.title: my tears ricochet
songs.description: "Even on my worst day, did I deserve, babe, all the hell you gave me?"

songs.title: peace
songs.description: "I'm a fire and I'll keep your brittle heart warm if your cascade ocean wave blues come.

songs.title: the 1
songs.description: "And if my wishes came true, it would've been you."

songs.title: the lakes
songs.description: "Those Windermere peaks look like a perfect place to cry. I'm setting off, but not without my muse."

songs.title: the last great american dynasty
songs.description: "There goes the maddest woman this town has ever seen."

songs.title: this is me trying
songs.description: "It's hard to be anywhere these days, when all I want is you."

songs.title: champagne problems
songs.description: "You had a speech, you're speechless. Love slipped beyond your reaches, and I couldn't give a reason."

songs.title: closure
songs.description: "Don't treat me like some situation that needs to be handled. I'm fine with my spite, and my tears, and my beers, and my candles."

songs.title: coney island
songs.description: "Do you miss the rogue who coaxed you into paradise and left you there?"

songs.title: cowboy like me
songs.description: "Now you hang from my lips like the Gardens of Babylon, with your boots beneath my bed. Forever is the sweetest con."

songs.title: dorothea
songs.description: "It's never too late to come back to my side."

songs.title: evermore
songs.description: "Guess I'm feeling unmoored. Can't remember what I used to fight for."

songs.title: gold rush
songs.description: "I don't like that falling feels like flying 'till the bone crush. Everybody wants you, and I don't like a gold rush."

songs.title: happiness
songs.description: "No one teaches you what to do when a good man hurts you and you know you hurt him too."

songs.title: it's time to go
songs.description: "Sometimes giving up is the strong thing. Sometimes to run is the brave thing."

songs.title: ivy
songs.description: "I'd live and die for moments that we stole on begged and borrowed time."

songs.title: long story short
songs.description: "Pushed from the precipice, climbed right back up the cliff. Long story short, I survived."

songs.title: no body, no crime
songs.description: "She thinks I did it but she just can't prove it. No, no body, no crime. I wasn't letting up until the day he died."

songs.title: right where you left me
songs.description: "You told me that you met someone. Glass shattered on the white cloth."

songs.title: tis the damn season
songs.description: "We could call it even, even though I'm leaving, and I'll be yours for the weekend."

songs.title: tolerate it
songs.description: "I made you my temple, my mural, my sky. Now I'm begging for footnotes in the story of your life."

songs.title: willow
songs.description: "The more that you say, the less I know. Wherever you stray, I follow."

combined.name: Expanded catalog
combined.note: 149 original study songs plus 91 added songs scored by averaging 4 separate AI lyric evaluations. This extended dataset does not belong to the original study.

songs.title: White Horse

songs.title: You Belong With Me

songs.title: You're Not Sorry

songs.title: Enchanted

songs.title: Haunted

songs.title: If This Was a Movie
songs.description: "I know that we could work it out somehow, but if this was a movie you'd be here by now."

songs.title: Last Kiss
songs.description: "I don't know how to be something you miss. I never thought we'd have a last kiss."

songs.title: Long Live
songs.description: "Long live all the mountains we moved. I had the time of my life fighting dragons with you."

songs.title: Mean

songs.title: Mine
songs.description: "You made a rebel of a careless man's careful daughter. You are the best thing that's ever been mine."

songs.title: Ours
songs.description: "And it's not theirs to speculate if it's wrong. And your hands are tough, but they are where mine belong."

songs.title: Sparks Fly
songs.description: "Give me something that'll haunt me when you're not around, 'cause I see sparks fly whenever you smile."

songs.title: Speak Now
songs.description: "I am not the kind of girl who should be rudely barging in on a white veil occasion, but you are not the kind of boy who should be marrying the wrong girl."

songs.title: The Story of Us
songs.description: "I don't know what to say since the twist of fate when it all broke down. And the story of us looks a lot like a tragedy now."

songs.title: Superman
songs.description: "I watch superman fly away. Come back, I'll be with you someday. I'll be right here on the ground."
"We're happy, free, confused, and lonely at the same time. It's miserable and magical."

songs.title: All Too Well
songs.description: "Wind in my hair, I was there, I remember it all too well."

songs.title: Begin Again
songs.description: "I've been spending the last eight months thinking all love ever does is break and burn and end. But on a Wednesday, in a cafe, I watched it begin again."

songs.title: Come Back... Be Here
songs.description: "And this is when the feeling sinks in. I don't want to miss you like this. Come back, be here."

songs.title: Everything Has Changed
songs.description: "You'll be mine and I'll be yours. All I know since yesterday is everything has changed."

songs.title: Girl at Home
songs.description: "Don't look at me, you've got a girl at home, and everybody knows that."

songs.title: Holy Ground
songs.description: "Tonight I'm gonna dance for all that we've been through, but I don't want to dance if I'm not dancing with you."

songs.title: I Almost Do
songs.description: "And I wish I could run to you. And I hope you know that every time I don't, I almost do."

songs.title: I Knew You Were Trouble
songs.description: "I knew you were trouble when you walked in, so shame on me now."

songs.title: The Last Time
songs.description: "This is the last time I'm asking you this. Put my name at the top of your list."

songs.title: The Lucky One
songs.description: "And they tell you that you're lucky, but you're so confused. 'Cause you don't feel pretty, you just feel used."

songs.title: The Moment I Knew
songs.description: "Standing there in my party dress in red lipstick, with no one to impress."

songs.title: Red
songs.description: "Remembering him comes in flashbacks and echoes. Tell myself it's time now, got to let go, but moving on from him is impossible."

songs.title: Sad Beautiful Tragic
songs.description: "Distance, timing, breakdown, fighting. Silence, this train runs off its tracks."

songs.title: Starlight
songs.description: "The whole place was dressed to the nines and we were dancing, dancing like we're made of starlight."

songs.title: State of Grace
songs.description: "This is a state of grace. This is a worthwhile fight. Love is a ruthless game unless you play it good and right."

songs.title: Stay Stay Stay
songs.description: "But you carry my groceries and now I'm always laughing. And I love you because you have given me no choice but to stay stay stay."

songs.title: Treacherous
songs.description: "I can't decide if it's a choice, getting swept away. I hear the sound of my own voice asking you to stay."

songs.title: We Are Never Getting Back Together
songs.description: "You go talk to your friends, talk to my friends, talk to me. But we are never ever ever ever getting back together."

songs.title: All You Had To Do Was Stay
songs.description: "People like you always want back the love they pushed aside, but people like me are gone forever when you say goodbye. Hey, all you had to do was stay."

songs.title: Bad Blood
songs.description: "Now did you think it all through? All these things will catch up to you and time can heal but this won't. So, if you're coming my way, just don't."

songs.title: Blank Space
songs.description: "Got a long list of ex-lovers. They'll tell you I'm insane. But I've got a blank space, baby, and I'll write your name."

songs.title: Clean
songs.description: "And by morning gone was any trace of you. I think I am finally clean."

songs.title: How You Get the Girl
songs.description: "I would wait forever and ever. Broke your heart, I'll put it back together."

songs.title: I Know Places
songs.description: "Just grab my hand and don't ever drop it, my love. Baby, I know places we won't be found."

songs.title: I Wish You Would
songs.description: "I wish you would come back. Wish I'd never hung up the phone like I did."

songs.title: New Romantics
songs.description: "We are too busy dancing to get knocked off our feet. Baby we're the new romantics. The best people in life are free."

songs.title: Out of the Woods
songs.description: "I walked out and said 'I'm setting you free.' But the monsters turned out to be just trees. And when the sun came up, you were looking at me."

songs.title: Shake It Off
songs.description: "The haters gonna hate, hate, hate, hate, hate. Baby I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake. I shake it off."

songs.title: Style
songs.description: "And when we go crashing down, we come back every time 'cause we never go out of style."

songs.title: This Love
songs.description: "This love is alive back from the dead. These hands had to let it go free and this love came back to me."

songs.title: Welcome to New York
songs.description: "I could dance to this beat, beat forever more. The lights are so bright but they never blind me."

songs.title: Wildest Dreams
songs.description: "Say you'll see me again, even if it's just in your wildest dreams."

songs.title: Wonderland
songs.description: "You search the world for something else to make you feel like what we had. And in the end in wonderland we both went mad."

songs.title: You Are In Love
songs.description: "You can hear it in the silence. You can feel it on the way home. You can see it with the lights out. You are in love, true love."

songs.title: Call It What You Want
songs.description: "I'm laughing with my lover, making forts under covers. Trust him like a brother, yeah, you know I did one thing right."

songs.title: Dancing With Our Hands Tied
songs.description: "I loved you in spite of deep fears that the world would divide us. So, baby, can we dance, oh, through an avalanche?"

songs.title: Delicate
songs.description: "Long night, with your hands up in my hair. Echoes of your footsteps on the stairs. Stay here, honey, I don't want to share."

songs.title: Don't Blame Me
songs.description: "Don't blame me, love made me crazy. If it doesn't you ain't doin' it right."

songs.title: Dress
songs.description: "I don't want you like a best friend. Only bought this dress so you could take it off."

songs.title: End Game
songs.description: "So here's the truth from my red lips. I wanna be your endgame."

songs.title: Getaway Car
songs.description: "We were jet-set, Bonnie and Clyde, until I switched to the other side. It's no surprise I turned you in, 'cause us traitors never win."

songs.title: Gorgeous
songs.description: "If you've got a girlfriend, I'm jealous of her. But if you're single, that's honestly worse. 'Cause you're so gorgeous it actually hurts."

songs.title: I Did Something Bad
songs.description: "If a man talks shit, then I owe him nothing. I don't regret it one bit, 'cause he had it coming."

songs.title: King of My Heart
songs.description: "And all at once, you are the one I have been waiting for. King of my heart, body and soul."

songs.title: Look What You Made Me Do
songs.description: "And then the world moves on, but one thing's for sure. Maybe I got mine, but you'll all get yours."

songs.title: New Year's Day
songs.description: "I'll be there if you're the toast of the town babe, or if you strike out and you're crawling back home."

songs.title: This Is Why We Can't Have Nice Things
songs.description: "There I was giving you a second chance, but you stabbed me in the back while shaking my hand."

songs.title: Afterglow
songs.description: "Fighting with a true love is boxing with no gloves. Chemistry 'til it blows up, 'til there's no us."

songs.title: Cornelia Street
songs.description: "And baby, I get mystified by how this city screams your name."

songs.title: Cruel Summer
songs.description: "Devils roll the dice, angels roll their eyes. What doesn't kill me makes me want you more."

songs.title: Daylight
songs.description: "I've been sleepin' so long in a twenty-year dark night, and now I see daylight."

songs.title: Death By A Thousand Cuts
songs.description: "Saying goodbye is death by a thousand cuts. Flashbacks waking me up."

songs.title: False God
songs.description: "Religion's in your lips. Even if it's a false god, we'd still worship."

songs.title: I Forgot That You Existed
songs.description: "Free rent, livin' in my mind. But then something happened one magical night. I forgot that you existed."

songs.title: I Think He Knows
songs.description: "I want you, bless my soul. And I ain't gotta tell him. I think he knows."

songs.title: It's Nice To Have A Friend
songs.description: "Video games, you pass me a note. Sleeping in tents. It's nice to have a friend."

songs.title: London Boy
songs.description: "They say home is where the heart is, but God, I love the English."

songs.title: Lover
songs.description: "Can I go where you go? Can we always be this close, forever and ever?"

songs.title: ME!
songs.description: "Baby doll, when it comes to a lover, I promise that you'll never find another like ME!"

songs.title: Miss Americana & The Heartbreak Prince
songs.description: "We're so sad, we paint the town blue. Voted most likely to run away with you."

songs.title: Paper Rings
songs.description: "I like shiny things, but I'd marry you with paper rings. Uh huh, that's right. Darling, you're the one I want."

songs.title: Soon You'll Get Better
songs.description: "Desperate people find faith, so now I pray to Jesus too. And I say to you, 'Soon you'll get better'."

songs.title: The Archer
songs.description: "'Cause all of my enemies started out friends. Help me hold onto you."

songs.title: The Man
songs.description: "I'm so sick of running as fast as I can. Wondering if I'd get there quicker if I was a man."

songs.title: You Need To Calm Down
songs.description: "You need to just stop. Like can you just not step on my gown? You need to calm down."

songs.title: Only the Young
songs.description: "Don't say you're too tired to fight. It's just a matter of time. Up there's the finish line."

songs.title: august
songs.description: "August sipped away like a bottle of wine, 'cause you were never mine."

songs.title: betty
songs.description: "I'm only seventeen. I don't know anything, but I know I miss you."

songs.title: cardigan
songs.description: "I knew you'd linger like a tattoo kiss. I knew you'd haunt all my what-ifs."

songs.title: epiphany
songs.description: "Only twenty minutes to sleep, but you dream of some epiphany. Just one single glimpse of relief."

songs.title: exile
songs.description: "You were my town. Now I'm in exile seeing you out."

songs.title: hoax
songs.description: "Don't want no other shade of blue but you. No other sadness in the world will do."

songs.title: illicit affairs
songs.description: "And you know damn well. For you I would ruin myself a million little times."

songs.title: invisible string
songs.description: "Isn't it just so pretty to think all along there was some invisible string tying you to me?"

songs.title: mad woman
songs.description: "And you'll poke that bear 'till her claws come out. And you find something to wrap your noose around."

songs.title: mirrorball
songs.description: "I'm a mirrorball. I can change everything about me to fit in."

songs.title: my tears ricochet
songs.description: "Even on my worst day, did I deserve, babe, all the hell you gave me?"

songs.title: peace
songs.description: "I'm a fire and I'll keep your brittle heart warm if your cascade ocean wave blues come.

songs.title: the 1
songs.description: "And if my wishes came true, it would've been you."

songs.title: the lakes
songs.description: "Those Windermere peaks look like a perfect place to cry. I'm setting off, but not without my muse."

songs.title: the last great american dynasty
songs.description: "There goes the maddest woman this town has ever seen."

songs.title: this is me trying
songs.description: "It's hard to be anywhere these days, when all I want is you."

songs.title: champagne problems
songs.description: "You had a speech, you're speechless. Love slipped beyond your reaches, and I couldn't give a reason."

songs.title: closure
songs.description: "Don't treat me like some situation that needs to be handled. I'm fine with my spite, and my tears, and my beers, and my candles."

songs.title: coney island
songs.description: "Do you miss the rogue who coaxed you into paradise and left you there?"

songs.title: cowboy like me
songs.description: "Now you hang from my lips like the Gardens of Babylon, with your boots beneath my bed. Forever is the sweetest con."

songs.title: dorothea
songs.description: "It's never too late to come back to my side."

songs.title: evermore
songs.description: "Guess I'm feeling unmoored. Can't remember what I used to fight for."

songs.title: gold rush
songs.description: "I don't like that falling feels like flying 'till the bone crush. Everybody wants you, and I don't like a gold rush."

songs.title: happiness
songs.description: "No one teaches you what to do when a good man hurts you and you know you hurt him too."

songs.title: it's time to go
songs.description: "Sometimes giving up is the strong thing. Sometimes to run is the brave thing."

songs.title: ivy
songs.description: "I'd live and die for moments that we stole on begged and borrowed time."

songs.title: long story short
songs.description: "Pushed from the precipice, climbed right back up the cliff. Long story short, I survived."

songs.title: no body, no crime
songs.description: "She thinks I did it but she just can't prove it. No, no body, no crime. I wasn't letting up until the day he died."

songs.title: right where you left me
songs.description: "You told me that you met someone. Glass shattered on the white cloth."

songs.title: tis the damn season
songs.description: "We could call it even, even though I'm leaving, and I'll be yours for the weekend."

songs.title: tolerate it
songs.description: "I made you my temple, my mural, my sky. Now I'm begging for footnotes in the story of your life."

songs.title: willow
songs.description: "The more that you say, the less I know. Wherever you stray, I follow."

songs.title: You All Over Me (feat. Maren Morris)
songs.description: A new beginning still carries the dust of an old heartbreak.

songs.title: Mr. Perfectly Fine
songs.description: Confidence returns the moment the narrator stops mourning someone careless.

songs.title: We Were Happy
songs.description: A lost relationship is remembered through the warmth of ordinary shared moments.

songs.title: That's When (feat. Keith Urban)
songs.description: Two people circle the idea of coming back when the hurt has cooled.

songs.title: Don't You
songs.description: An old flame reappears before the narrator is ready to feel everything again.

songs.title: Bye Bye Baby
songs.description: Affection lingers, but the narrator finally accepts the ending.

songs.title: Electric Touch (feat. Fall Out Boy)
songs.description: Hope and fear collide in the first spark of a risky new connection.

songs.title: When Emma Falls in Love
songs.description: A friend's charm transforms love into something bright and cinematic.

songs.title: I Can See You
songs.description: Hidden attraction slips past restraint and turns into bold fantasy.

songs.title: Castles Crumbling (feat. Hayley Williams)
songs.description: Fame feels fragile when admiration starts to sound like disappointment.

songs.title: Foolish One
songs.description: The narrator confronts the pain of mistaking wishful thinking for devotion.

songs.title: Timeless
songs.description: Love is imagined as something strong enough to survive any era.

songs.title: Better Man
songs.description: The heartbreak comes from knowing love might have worked if he had grown up.

songs.title: Nothing New (feat. Phoebe Bridgers)
songs.description: Youth and relevance feel temporary under the pressure of being watched.

songs.title: Babe
songs.description: Betrayal turns anger into a clear refusal to be fooled again.

songs.title: Message in a Bottle
songs.description: A bottled confession turns nerves into pure excitement.

songs.title: I Bet You Think About Me (feat. Chris Stapleton)
songs.description: The narrator mocks an ex while sounding entirely unforgettable.

songs.title: Forever Winter
songs.description: Love becomes an anxious vigil beside someone slipping into darkness.

songs.title: Run (feat. Ed Sheeran)
songs.description: Escaping together feels safer than staying where the world can reach them.

songs.title: The Very First Night
songs.description: The rush of young love survives in memory long after the relationship fades.

songs.title: All Too Well (10 Minute Version)
songs.description: A once-intimate love story is reconstructed in devastating detail.

songs.title: 'Slut!'
songs.description: Public judgment shrinks beside the thrill of loving someone worth the risk.

songs.title: Say Don't Go
songs.description: The narrator hangs on to a relationship that could be saved by one honest choice.

songs.title: Now That We Don't Talk
songs.description: Distance turns old intimacy into a list of things that no longer fit.

songs.title: Suburban Legends
songs.description: A relationship feels destined to become a myth, even if it cannot last.

songs.title: Is It Over Now?
songs.description: After the collapse, questions remain sharper than closure.

songs.title: Lavender Haze
songs.description: Protecting private love matters more than fitting anyone else's script.

songs.title: Maroon
songs.description: Love is remembered as deep, dark, and permanently staining.

songs.title: Anti-Hero
songs.description: Self-awareness turns inward until the narrator becomes their own worst suspect.

songs.title: Snow on the Beach (feat. Lana Del Rey)
songs.description: Mutual love feels so rare it arrives like something impossible made real.

songs.title: You're on Your Own, Kid
songs.description: Growing up means discovering that survival can become its own strength.

songs.title: Midnight Rain
songs.description: The narrator chooses transformation even though it costs a softer kind of love.

songs.title: Question...?
songs.description: An unresolved romance returns as a challenge disguised as a memory.

songs.title: Vigilante Shit
songs.description: Revenge is delivered with icy precision instead of open grief.

songs.title: Bejeweled
songs.description: Neglect gives way to a bright refusal to feel small.

songs.title: Labyrinth
songs.description: Falling in love again feels beautiful and terrifying in equal measure.

songs.title: Karma
songs.description: The narrator frames justice as a force already working in her favor.

songs.title: Sweet Nothing
songs.description: Peace lives in the quiet tenderness of being known gently.

songs.title: Mastermind
songs.description: Careful planning hides the vulnerable wish to be chosen on purpose.

songs.title: The Great War
songs.description: A bruised relationship survives because both people keep returning to the fight for it.

songs.title: Bigger Than the Whole Sky
songs.description: Loss is so large that language barely contains it.

songs.title: Paris
songs.description: Romance becomes strongest when the outside world is shut out completely.

songs.title: High Infidelity
songs.description: The relationship breaks under the weight of emotional betrayal and neglect.

songs.title: Glitch
songs.description: What started as an accident begins to feel strangely fated.

songs.title: Would've, Could've, Should've
songs.description: The narrator reclaims the story of a wound that still shapes her.

songs.title: Dear Reader
songs.description: Advice is offered with the uneasy honesty of someone still unraveling.

songs.title: Hits Different
songs.description: A breakup feels unbearable precisely because this love was not ordinary.

songs.title: You're Losing Me (From the Vault)
songs.description: A relationship dies slowly while the narrator begs for signs of life.

songs.title: Fortnight (feat. Post Malone)
songs.description: A brief connection expands into obsession and emotional fallout.

songs.title: The Tortured Poets Department
songs.description: Romance is performed like a private joke until it becomes self-destruction.

songs.title: My Boy Only Breaks His Favorite Toys
songs.description: The narrator sees the pattern of being cherished only to be damaged.

songs.title: Down Bad
songs.description: Heartbreak becomes humiliation, longing, and emotional free fall all at once.

songs.title: So Long, London
songs.description: The goodbye is quiet, exhausted, and final.

songs.title: But Daddy I Love Him
songs.description: Judgment from the crowd only hardens the narrator's refusal to obey it.

songs.title: Fresh Out the Slammer
songs.description: Freedom feels inseparable from running back into dangerous desire.

songs.title: Florida!!! (feat. Florence and the Machine)
songs.description: Escape is imagined as loud, reckless reinvention.

songs.title: Guilty as Sin?
songs.description: Forbidden wanting thrives in the space before anything is confessed aloud.

songs.title: Who's Afraid of Little Old Me?
songs.description: The narrator turns public distortion into theatrical power.

songs.title: I Can Fix Him (No Really I Can)
songs.description: Delusion and devotion blur as the narrator insists she can redeem the wrong man.

songs.title: loml
songs.description: What looked like the love of a lifetime becomes the loss of it.

songs.title: I Can Do It with a Broken Heart
songs.description: Professional shine hides a private collapse that never gets a pause.

songs.title: The Smallest Man Who Ever Lived
songs.description: Rage sharpens into contempt for someone who left damage without stature.

songs.title: The Alchemy
songs.description: Love returns with the energy of a triumphant comeback.

songs.title: Clara Bow
songs.description: Admiration and exploitation blur inside the machinery of fame.

songs.title: The Black Dog
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: Absence feels unbearable when tiny traces of the other person still surface.

songs.title: imgonnagetyouback
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: Love and revenge share the same pulse in a dangerously open threat.

songs.title: The Albatross
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: A feared reputation shadows intimacy before it can settle.

songs.title: Chloe or Sam or Sophia or Marcus
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: Memory fragments a relationship until even the names feel unstable.

songs.title: How Did It End?
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: Private grief is interrupted by the world's appetite for an explanation.

songs.title: So High School
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: Romance feels playful, adolescent, and gloriously uncomplicated.

songs.title: I Hate It Here
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: Fantasy becomes a refuge from a reality the narrator cannot stand.

songs.title: thanK you aIMee
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: Old cruelty is reframed as fuel for survival and success.

songs.title: I Look in People's Windows
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: Longing becomes voyeuristic in the aftermath of separation.

songs.title: The Prophecy
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: The narrator pleads against a fate that keeps withholding love.

songs.title: Cassandra
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: Warning the truth becomes another way of being dismissed.

songs.title: Peter
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: The memory of unfinished love remains suspended between tenderness and delay.

songs.title: The Bolter
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: Leaving becomes instinct whenever closeness threatens to harden into capture.

songs.title: Robin
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: Innocence is guarded with unusual softness against the weight of the world.

songs.title: The Manuscript
songs.album: The Tortured Poets Department: The Anthology
songs.description: Pain is finally placed into narrative form instead of relived in real time.

songs.title: The Fate of Ophelia
songs.description: Love is cast as the force that keeps the narrator from tragic collapse.

songs.title: Elizabeth Taylor
songs.description: Romance and celebrity reflect each other in glamorous, scrutinized light.

songs.title: Opalite
songs.description: Joy arrives as a shimmering certainty after earlier disappointments.

songs.title: Father Figure
songs.description: The narrator dismantles an old power imbalance with bitter clarity.

songs.title: Eldest Daughter
songs.description: Responsibility becomes identity before anyone asks whether it is fair.

songs.title: Ruin the Friendship
songs.description: Desire pushes two people toward the point where safety and closeness cannot coexist.

songs.title: Actually Romantic
songs.description: The narrator turns gossip and obsession into proof of her own allure.

songs.title: Wi$h Li$t
songs.description: Fame falls away in favor of a future that feels intimate and ordinary.

songs.title: Wood
songs.description: Playfulness and sensuality become a private language inside a happy relationship.

songs.title: CANCELLED!
songs.description: Public outrage is answered with sarcasm and defiance.

songs.title: Honey
songs.description: Simple affection becomes healing when it comes from the right person.

songs.title: The Life of a Showgirl (feat. Sabrina Carpenter)
songs.description: Ambition and performance are framed as the price of becoming the star of your own story.
